name: JinXianDai Information Industry Co.,Ltd.
summary: JinXianDai Information Industry Co.,Ltd. develops software products in China. It offers data visualization, mobile application, testing, UED, artificial intelligence, and other software products. The company also provides information solutions and services for various industries, such as power, petrochemical, public security, railway, government, aerospace, communications, coal, and others. It distributes its products in 22 provinces, 5 autonomous regions, and 4 municipalities. JinXianDai Information Industry Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Jinan, China.
